productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men White Ambition Sports Shoes
description: For all you beginners of tennis, here's that iconic shoe from adidas that can shape you into a winner with ease. The Ambition STR V M tennis shoe is a classic tough shoe that provides a timeless layout and absolute grip, allowing you to concentrate on the game with ease.UpperSynthetic leather upper engineered with perforations for absolute durability and breathable comfortMeshed and padded collar and tongue for enhanced breathability Meshed and cushioned inner for absolute breathable comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitErgonomically curved and padded foot-bed for all-day comfortMidsoleEVA injected insole that offers impact protection when hitting the ground at hard speedsOutsoleNon-marking gum rubber outsole with herringbone grooves for ease of movement and enhanced durabilityTorsion system for better torsion-abilityShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
